description: Evaluates security training maturity—proactive development of security education content and customized training tailored to specific functional units and user segments.

capabilities.name: Proactive Security Trainings
capabilities.description: The enterprise proactively creates or hires security training content creators to develop security education materials.
evaluation_focus: Create or hire security training content creators
Proactive development of security education trainings

capabilities.name: Customized security training for various user segments
capabilities.description: Security trainings are tailored to specific functional units and user segments across the enterprise.
evaluation_focus: Tailored security trainings for specific functional units
Segmented security training for various user groups

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
